channel.title: Vancouver Community Directory
channel.description: A comprehensive guide to groups, clubs, meetups, and events in Vancouver, BC.

item.title: Dinner & Supper Clubs
item.description: Find dinner clubs and supper clubs in Vancouver. Meet new people over curated meals and social dining.

item.title: Social & Friend Clubs
item.description: Vancouver social clubs and friend-making groups. Connect through organized meetups and community events.

item.title: Run Clubs
item.description: Vancouver running clubs and social runs. Find free group runs and running communities for all levels.

item.title: Board Games
item.description: Board game cafes and game nights in Vancouver. Weekly meetups, gaming cafes, and tabletop communities.

item.title: Creative & Art
item.description: Vancouver art collectives and creative communities. Studios, workshops, and groups for artists.

item.title: Photography
item.description: Vancouver photography clubs and photo walks. Community shoots and photography meetups.

item.title: Film & Cinema
item.description: Vancouver film clubs and cinema events. Independent screenings and film societies.

item.title: Writing
item.description: Vancouver writing groups and workshops. Critique circles and literary communities.

item.title: Language Exchange
item.description: Language exchange meetups in Vancouver. Practice languages with native speakers.

item.title: Hiking & Outdoors
item.description: Vancouver hiking groups and outdoor clubs. Find trail buddies and adventure communities.

item.title: Cycling
item.description: Vancouver cycling clubs and group rides. Social rides and cycling communities.

item.title: Dance
item.description: Dance classes and social dancing in Vancouver. Salsa, bachata, swing, and more.

item.title: Improv & Comedy
item.description: Vancouver improv classes and comedy shows. Learn improv and join funny communities.

item.title: Music & Open Mic
item.description: Open mics and jam sessions in Vancouver. Find stages and musicians to collaborate with.

item.title: Climbing
item.description: Vancouver climbing gyms and communities. Find climbing partners and bouldering meetups.

item.title: Pickleball
item.description: Pickleball courts and clubs in Vancouver. Drop-in games and leagues.

item.title: Pottery & Ceramics
item.description: Pottery studios and ceramics classes in Vancouver. Wheel throwing and clay communities.

item.title: Yoga & Wellness
item.description: Free yoga and wellness events in Vancouver. Community classes and outdoor yoga.

item.title: Sauna & Cold Plunge
item.description: Sauna clubs and cold plunge spots in Vancouver. Contrast therapy and recovery communities.

item.title: Mindfulness & Meditation
item.description: Meditation groups in Vancouver. Sitting groups and mindfulness meetups.

item.title: Men's Groups
item.description: Men's circles and support groups in Vancouver. Brotherhood and personal growth.

item.title: Maker Spaces
item.description: Vancouver maker spaces and workshops. Access tools and join the maker community.

item.title: Philosophy & Intellectual
item.description: Philosophy meetups and discussion groups in Vancouver. Deep conversations.

item.title: Book Clubs
item.description: Vancouver book clubs and reading groups. Find your literary community.

item.title: Tech & Startup
item.description: Vancouver tech meetups and startup community. Founders and developers connecting.

item.title: Coworking
item.description: Coworking spaces in Vancouver. Find your workspace community.

item.title: Volunteer
item.description: Volunteer opportunities in Vancouver. Give back through community service.

item.title: Vinyl & Listening Bars
item.description: Vinyl bars and listening rooms in Vancouver. Record shops and audiophile community.

item.title: Chess
item.description: Chess clubs and cafe meetups in Vancouver. Find games and tournaments.

item.title: Underground DJ
item.description: Underground parties and DJ events in Vancouver. Warehouse raves and electronic music.

item.title: Poetry & Spoken Word
item.description: Poetry slams and spoken word in Vancouver. Open mics and poetry nights.

item.title: Tarot & Astrology
item.description: Tarot and astrology communities in Vancouver. Spiritual groups and readings.

item.title: Flea Markets & Vintage
item.description: Flea markets and vintage events in Vancouver. Thrift and collector communities.

item.title: Pub Trivia
item.description: Pub trivia nights in Vancouver. Test your knowledge and find your team.

item.title: Zine & Risograph
item.description: Zine making and risograph printing in Vancouver. DIY publishing community.

item.title: Astronomy & Stargazing
item.description: Astronomy clubs and stargazing in Vancouver. Star parties and telescope nights.

item.title: Foraging & Nature
item.description: Foraging tours and nature walks in Vancouver. Learn wild foods.

item.title: Birdwatching
item.description: Birdwatching groups in Vancouver. Birding walks and nature community.

item.title: Karaoke
item.description: Karaoke bars and nights in Vancouver. Sing your heart out.

item.title: Resources
item.description: Vancouver community resources and directories.
